name: Studio Fore
about: Studio Fore is a private golf simulator club located in Norton Commons, Louisville. It operates as a 2,000 sq. ft. unstaffed facility where members can bring their own food and drinks. The venue features two state-of-the-art TrackMan simulators and a spacious lounge area, designed for a private, convenient golf experience.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan technology for precise swing analysis
Year-round access to top-tier golf regardless of weather
Private, exclusive environment for focused practice or entertainment
Ability to bring your own food and drinks for a personalized experience
Luxury lounge area with TVs and premium seating for relaxation

food_and_drink.notes: Members are welcome to bring their own food
Members are welcome to bring their own drinks (BYOB)

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, Studio Fore is an unstaffed facility where members are welcome to bring their own food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is Studio Fore kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and suitable for kids.
